summary: This Excel file contains performance test results comparing streaming versus non-streaming AI call responses, including latency and word count metrics. It also includes a conversation history log detailing the system prompt persona (a compassionate psychologist) and a sample dialogue in Spanish regarding a user's relationship. The data reflects internal engineering testing of the AI agent's latency and conversational capabilities.
path_to_original: /Users/eduardolizana/Documents/6. Companies /1. Companies with Rodrigo/KeepMeCompany/6. Analytics/2. Performance Tests/Analytics - Streaming Call Tests.xlsx
sniff_test_notes: Conversation is in Spanish despite the UK/NHS context; system prompt specifies Simon Sinek tone; appears to be synthetic test data rather than real patient records.
